brother_succession.description: When a brother dies, revive() is called. If brother < 3, next brother takes over.

game_start.description: Village of Tambry — all brothers start here

sequence: 1. Dead brother's position saved to ob_listg[brother] (ob_stat=1 for body, ob_stat=3 for ghost at brother+2)
2. Sorceress reset: ob_list8[9].ob_stat = 3 (makes sorceress available to new brother)
3. New brother gets fresh stats from blist[] — all items cleared (stuff[0..GOLDBASE-1] = 0)
4. New brother starts with Dirk only (stuff[0] = weapon = 1)
6. If brother == 3 (all dead), game over — placard 6

brothers.description: Eldest brother, strongest and bravest. First to quest.
brothers.name: Julian

brothers.description: Middle brother, luckiest. Quests if Julian dies.
brothers.name: Phillip

carriers.name: Bird
carriers.note: Bird appears at bird extent. Player auto-mounts on approach.

carriers.name: Swan
carriers.note: Shares actor file 11 with bird. Swan is lassoed bird. When active_carrier==11 and lasso obtained, stuff[5]=1. riding==11 means swan (can fly over mountains).

carriers.name: Turtle
carriers.note: Summoned via USE Sea Shell (get_turtle at fmain.c:3510-3518). Places turtle at random ocean tile near hero.
carriers.prerequisite: Sea Shell (stuff[6]) — obtained by talking to turtle after saving turtle eggs

carriers.name: Dragon
carriers.note: Dragon appears at dragon extent in its cave. Not rideable — it's a hostile encounter that drops the Talisman (race 9 → leave_item 139). Citation: fmain.c:1754

events.10: as had his brother before him.
events.11: as had his brothers before him.
events.12: % just couldn't stay awake any longer!
events.15: Even % would not be stupid enough to draw weapon in here.
events.16: A great calming influence comes over %, preventing him from drawing his weapon.
events.17: % picked up a scrap of paper.
events.19: It read: "Meet me at midnight at the Crypt. Signed, the Wraith Lord."
events.22: % bought some food and ate it.
events.26: % was tired, so he decided to lie down and sleep.
events.32: Ground is too hot for swan to land.
events.36: % put an apple away for later.
events.8: % was turned to stone by the witch.
events.9: % started the journey in his home village of Tambry

golden_statues.gate: Desert door (Azal entrance) requires stuff[STATBASE] >= 5. Citation: fmain.c:1919, fmain.c:3594
golden_statues.note: stuff[25] = STATBASE = total count of gold statues. When stuff[25] >= 5, the desert gate opens and hidden city (Azal) becomes accessible. The map tile at sector position (11*128+26) is also unblocked. Citation: fmain.c:3594-3596

sources.description: First visit to sorceress gives one statue (speak 45). Sets ob_listg[9].ob_stat = 1.
Show writ to priest, receive one statue. Sets ob_listg[10].ob_stat = 1. Can only receive once.
ob_listg entries 5-9 are gold statue objects placed in the world. ob_listg[5] visibility depends on lightlevel (fmain.c:2027-2028). Others are scattered. Picking them up increments stuff[25].

magic_effects.effect: Teleport (stone_list coordinates). Cannot use indoors (region > 7 without cheat).
magic_effects.name: Blue Stone

magic_effects.effect: Unknown/unused in MAGIC handler (hit==7 not handled in MAGIC case)
magic_effects.name: Glass Vial

magic_effects.effect: Overhead map view (bigdraw). Cannot use indoors without cheat.
magic_effects.name: Bird Totem

magic_effects.effect: Freeze enemies: freeze_timer += 100. Cannot use while riding.
magic_effects.name: Gold Ring

magic_effects.effect: Not in MAGIC switch (hit values 5-10 only). Possibly consumed as treasure.
magic_effects.name: Jade Skull

metadata.description: Quest and narrative database for The Faery Tale Adventure (1987 Amiga). Contains all dialogue text, NPC routing logic, quest item chains, transport system, and game progression data extracted from the original source code.
source_files: fmain.c (core game loop, dialogue, combat, items)
narr.asm (all game text: speeches, events, placards, place names)

bartender.shop_note: BUY handler at fmain.c:3426-3441 uses jtrans[] lookup for bartender purchases

give_handler.effect: wealth -= 2, kind may increase (if rand64() > kind), beggar speaks hint

routing.description: Beggar gives hint based on goal (object list index)

0.hint: Seek two women, one Good, one Evil (sorceress and witch)

1.hint: Jewels → gift of Sight (Green Jewel for night vision)

2.hint: Hidden city — can't find what you can't see (Crystal Orb needed)

routing.description: Ghost of dead brother, says find bones for useful items

king.note: After princess rescue, king gives writ (speech 18) and 100 gold — handled in rescue() at fmain2.c:1599

priest.healing_note: Healing occurs on ALL kind>=10 visits without writ, regardless of which rotating message plays. Citation: fmain.c:3390-3391

routing.condition: has writ (stuff[28]) AND statue not yet given (ob_listg[10].ob_stat==0)
routing.description: Priest gives golden statue, marks ob_listg[10] as given

routing.condition: has writ AND statue already given

routing.description: Rotating message (36/37/38), ALWAYS heals to (15 + brave/4)
Direction to dragon varies by ranger's goal (object list index)
Sorceress gives golden statue, sets ob_listg[9].ob_stat = 1
Silent luck boost: luck += 5 if luck < rand64()

give_handler.condition: GIVE bone (hit==8, stuff[29]>0, nearest is spectre 0x8a)

routing.description: Spectre asks for bones of ancient king

witch.combat_note: Witch uses gaze attack (petrification). USE Sun Stone when witchflag==True to make vulnerable (speak 60). Citation: fmain.c:3462

0.hint: Kind deeds → friend from the sea (turtle)

1.hint: Seek the place that is darker than night (Tombs of Hemsath / dungeons)

3.hint: Witch lives in Grimwood, gaze is death

6.hint: Tame the golden beast (swan), need a rope (lasso)

routing.description: Wizard gives hint based on which wizard (goal = object list index)

1.text: "Rescue the Talisman!" was the Mayor's plea. "Only the Talisman can protect our village from the evil forces of the night." And so Julian set out on his quest to recover it.

10.text: [name] had rescued Kandy (Katra's and Karla's sister), Princess of Marheim. Though they had pledged their love for each other, [name] knew that his quest could not be forsaken.

11.text: After seeing the princess safely to her home city, and with a king's gift in gold, [name] once more set out on his quest.

12.text: So... You, game seeker, would guide the brothers to their destiny? You would aid them and give directions? Answer, then, these three questions and prove your fitness to be their advisor:

2.text: Unfortunately for Julian, his luck had run out. Many months passed and Julian did not return...

3.text: So Phillip set out, determined to find his brother and complete the quest.

4.text: But sadly, Phillip's cleverness could not save him from the same fate as his older brother.

5.text: So Kevin took up the quest, risking all, for the village had grown desperate. Young and inexperienced, his chances did not look good.

6.text: And so ends our sad tale. The Lesson of the Story: Stay at Home!

7.text: Having defeated the villanous Necromancer and recovered the Talisman, [name] returned to Marheim where he wed the princess...

8.text: [name] had rescued Katra, Princess of Marheim. Though they had pledged their love for each other, [name] knew that his quest could not be forsaken.

9.text: [name] had rescued Karla (Katra's sister), Princess of Marheim. Though they had pledged their love for each other, [name] knew that his quest could not be forsaken.

sequence: 1. Placard shows rescue narrative (varies by princess count: Katra/Karla/Kandy)
2. After-rescue placard (msg 17/18: king's gift + quest continues)
6. ob_list8[2] set to princess (ob_id=4) — princess placed in castle
princess_rescue.trigger: Enter extent with xtype == 83 when ob_list8[9].ob_stat != 0

quest_flow.description: The main quest is to recover the Talisman stolen by the Necromancer.

phases.description: Brother begins in Tambry with only a Dirk. Must explore, find better weapons, and build stats.
phases.name: Starting Out
objectives: Explore Tambry area (region 3) and surroundings
Find better weapons (Mace, Sword, Bow)
Talk to wizards for hints (requires kind >= 10)
Talk to beggars (give gold to increase kindness, receive prophecy hints)
Find turtle eggs in region 1 (Witch Wood) to befriend turtle

phases.description: Obtain the turtle for sea travel and eventually the swan for mountain flight.
phases.name: Gathering Transport
objectives: Find and approach turtle eggs (region 1) — turtle appears
Talk to turtle → receive Sea Shell
USE Sea Shell to summon turtle for ocean travel
Kill the Witch in Grimwood using Sun Stone → she drops Golden Lasso
Capture bird with Golden Lasso → becomes Swan (flies over mountains)

phases.description: Fly swan to the unreachable castle and rescue the king's daughter.
phases.name: Rescuing the Princess
objectives: Fly swan over mountains to the Forbidden Keep (region with princess extent)
Enter the rescue extent (xtype 83) → triggers rescue() sequence
Receive King's Writ + 100 gold + 3 of each key
Note: Princess names cycle — Katra, Karla, Kandy for subsequent rescues

phases.description: Gather 5 golden statues to unlock the hidden city of Azal in the desert.
phases.name: Collecting Golden Statues
objectives: Visit Sorceress → receive 1 statue (first visit only)
Show Writ to Priest → receive 1 statue
Find remaining statues as world objects (ob_listg entries)
Statues tracked in stuff[25] (STATBASE)

phases.description: Enter the desert, reach the hidden city of Azal, and traverse the spirit world.
phases.name: The Spirit Plane
objectives: With 5 statues, desert gate opens (stuff[STATBASE] >= 5)
Navigate to the hidden city of Azal in the Burning Waste
Enter the Spirit Plane (dungeon regions with Loraii enemies)
Find King's Bone in the Tombs of Hemsath
Give Bone to Spectre at the Graveyard → receive Crystal Shard

phases.description: Confront the Necromancer in the final arena and recover the Talisman.
phases.name: Defeating the Necromancer
objectives: Defeat the Dream Knight at the Elf Glade/Pixie Grove (race 7, 40 HP)
Dream Knight defeated → grants access to sacred shrine (speak 42)
Enter the Citadel of Doom
Reach the final arena (extent with Necromancer, race 9, 50 HP)
Defeat the Necromancer → drops Talisman (item 139)
Pick up Talisman (stuff[22]) → triggers victory sequence

victory.sequence: quitflag = TRUE, viewstatus = 2, win_colors() called, placard 7 shown

quest_items.gates: Win condition — picking up Talisman (stuff[22] != 0) triggers win_colors() and game end.
quest_items.how_obtained: Dropped by Necromancer (race 9) on death — leave_item(i, 139). Also dropped if race 0x09 transforms (fmain.c:1749-1754).
quest_items.name: Talisman

quest_items.gates: Show to Priest to receive golden statue (speak 39).
quest_items.how_obtained: King gives writ after princess rescue. Set in rescue() — stuff[28] = 1.
quest_items.name: Writ

quest_items.gates: Give to Spectre to receive Crystal Shard (leave_item 140).
quest_items.how_obtained: Found in dungeons (region 9), world object in ob_list9.
quest_items.name: Bone (King's Bone)

quest_items.gates: Passwall: allows walking through terrain type 12 (spirit barriers). Critical for navigating Spirit Plane dungeons.
quest_items.how_obtained: Spectre drops item 140 when given the Bone.
quest_items.name: Shard (Crystal Shard)

quest_items.gates: Fire immunity: when in fiery_death zone, stuff[23] resets environ to 0, preventing lava damage.
quest_items.name: Rose

quest_items.gates: Enables swan riding — when active_carrier==11, stuff[5] is set/checked. Swan can fly over mountains to reach princess.
quest_items.how_obtained: Dropped by dying creature with race 0x89 (witch) — leave_item(i, 27). Citation: fmain.c:1756
quest_items.name: Golden Lasso

quest_items.gates: USE Sea Shell to summon turtle (get_turtle). Turtle provides ocean transport.
quest_items.how_obtained: Talk to Turtle (active_carrier==5) when you don't have shell — turtle gives it (speak 56), stuff[6] = 1.
quest_items.name: Sea Shell

quest_items.gates: Two effects: (1) USE when witch on screen → speak(60), makes witch vulnerable. (2) Combat gate: without Sun Stone, attacks on witch (race 0x89) are blocked (speak 58 'Stupid fool, you can't hurt me with that!'). Citation: fmain2.c:231-234
quest_items.how_obtained: Found as world object in region 8 (interiors).
quest_items.name: Sun Stone

quest_items.gates: 5 statues needed to enter the desert / hidden city of Azal.
quest_items.how_obtained: Multiple sources: Sorceress, Priest (with writ), world objects. See golden_statues section.
quest_items.name: Gold Statue (x5)

quest_items.gates: MAGIC use: reveals large map view (bigdraw). Wizard hint 2 (speak 29) references this.
quest_items.how_obtained: Found as world object or from treasure drops.
quest_items.name: Crystal Orb

0.speaker: Ogre
0.text: % attempted to communicate with the Ogre but a guttural snarl was the only response.

10.speaker: Ranger
10.text: "Good luck, sonny!" said the ranger. "Hope you win!"

11.speaker: Ranger
11.text: "If you need to cross the lake" said the ranger, "There's a raft just north of here."

12.speaker: Bartender
12.text: "Would you like to buy something?" said the tavern keeper. "Or do you just need lodging for the night?"

13.speaker: Bartender
13.text: "Good Morning." said the tavern keeper. "Hope you slept well."

14.speaker: Bartender
14.text: "Have a drink!" said the tavern keeper."

15.speaker: Guard
15.text: "State your business!" said the guard. "My business is with the king." stated %, respectfully.

16.speaker: Princess
16.text: "Please, sir, rescue me from this horrible prison!" pleaded the princess.

17.speaker: King (before rescue)
17.text: "I cannot help you, young man." said the king. "My armies are decimated, and I fear that with the loss of my children, I have lost all hope."

18.speaker: King (after rescue)
18.text: "Here is a writ designating you as my official agent. Be sure and show this to the Priest before you leave Marheim.

19.speaker: King (statue already given)
19.text: "I'm afraid I cannot help you, young man. I already gave the golden statue to the other young man.

20.speaker: Noble
20.text: "If you could rescue the king's daughter," said Lord Trane, "The King's courage would be restored."

21.speaker: NPC (wrong bone recipient)
21.text: "Sorry, I have no use for it."

22.speaker: Ranger (region 2)
22.text: "The dragon's cave is directly north of here." said the ranger."

24.speaker: Beggar (hint 1)
24.text: "I have a prophecy for you, m'lord." said the beggar. "You must seek two women, one Good, one Evil."

25.speaker: Beggar (hint 2)
25.text: "Lovely Jewels, glint in the night - give to us the gift of Sight!" he said.

26.speaker: Beggar (hint 3)
26.text: "Where is the hidden city? How can you find it when you cannot even see it?" said the beggar.

27.speaker: Wizard (goal 0)
27.text: "Kind deeds could gain thee a friend from the sea."

28.speaker: Wizard (goal 1)
28.text: "Seek the place that is darker than night - There you shall find your goal in sight!" said the wizard, cryptically.

29.speaker: Wizard (goal 2)
29.text: "Like the eye itself, a crystal Orb can help to find things concealed."

3.speaker: Skeleton
3.text: A clattering of bones was the only reply.

30.speaker: Wizard (goal 3)
30.text: "The Witch lives in the dim forest of Grimwood, where the very trees are warped to her will. Her gaze is Death!"

31.speaker: Wizard (goal 4)
31.text: "Only the light of the Sun can destroy the Witch's Evil."

32.speaker: Wizard (goal 5)
32.text: "The maiden you seek lies imprisoned in an unreachable castle surrounded by unclimbable mountains."

33.speaker: Wizard (goal 6)
33.text: "Tame the golden beast and no mountain may deny you! But what rope could hold such a creature?"

35.speaker: Wizard (unkind)
35.text: "Away with you, young ruffian!" said the Wizard. "Perhaps you can find some small animal to torment if that pleases you!"

36.speaker: Priest (message 1)
36.text: "You must seek your enemy on the spirit plane. It is hazardous in the extreme. Space may twist, and time itself may run backwards!"

37.speaker: Priest (message 2)
37.text: "When you wish to travel quickly, seek the power of the Stones." he said.

38.speaker: Priest (message 3)
38.text: "Since you are brave of heart, I shall Heal all your wounds." Instantly % felt much better.

39.speaker: Priest (has writ)
39.text: "Ah! You have a writ from the king. Here is one of the golden statues of Azal-Car-Ithil. Find all five and you'll find the vanishing city."

4.speaker: Snake
4.text: % knew that it is a waste of time to talk to a snake.

40.speaker: Priest (unkind)
40.text: "Repent, Sinner! Thou art an uncouth brute and I have no interest in your conversation!"

41.speaker: Dream Knight (alive)
41.text: "Ho there, young traveler!" said the black figure. "None may enter the sacred shrine of the People who came Before!"

42.speaker: Dream Knight (defeated)
42.text: "Your prowess in battle is great." said the Knight of Dreams. "You have earned the right to enter and claim the prize."

43.speaker: Necromancer
43.text: "So this is the so-called Hero who has been sent to hinder my plans. Simply Pathetic. Well, try this, young Fool!"

44.speaker: Necromancer (defeated)
44.text: % gasped. The Necromancer had been transformed into a normal man. All of his evil was gone.

45.speaker: Sorceress (first visit)
45.text: "%. Welcome. Here is one of the five golden figurines you will need." "Thank you." said %.

46.speaker: Witch
46.text: "Look into my eyes and Die!!" hissed the witch. "Not a chance!" replied %

47.speaker: Spectre
47.text: "HE has usurped my place as lord of undead. Bring me bones of the ancient King and I'll help you destroy him."

48.speaker: Spectre (give bone)
48.text: % gave him the ancient bones. "Good! That spirit now rests quietly in my halls. Take this crystal shard."

49.speaker: Ghost
49.text: "%. I am the ghost of your dead brother. Find my bones -- there you will find some things you need.

50.speaker: NPC (give gold)
50.text: % gave him some gold coins. "Why, thank you, young sir!"

51.speaker: NPC (no shop)
51.text: "Sorry, but I have nothing to sell."

53.speaker: Ranger (goal 0)
53.text: "The dragon's cave is east of here." said the ranger."

54.speaker: Ranger (goal 1)
54.text: "The dragon's cave is west of here." said the ranger."

55.speaker: Ranger (goal 2)
55.text: "The dragon's cave is south of here." said the ranger."

56.speaker: Turtle (gives shell)
56.text: "Oh, thank you for saving my eggs, kind man!" said the turtle. "Take this seashell as a token of my gratitude."

57.speaker: Turtle (has shell)
57.text: "Just hop on my back if you need a ride somewhere." said the turtle.

58.speaker: Witch/Necro (immune)
58.text: "Stupid fool, you can't hurt me with that!"

60.speaker: (Sunstone effect)
60.text: The Sunstone has made the witch vulnerable!

8.speaker: NPC (too far)
8.text: "No need to shout, son!" he said.

9.speaker: Ranger
9.text: "Nice weather we're having, isn't it?" queried the ranger.
